text.message: To take the  wood port directly or...
so many good spots in the middle
not sure thats your best option imo
I wouldn't say good is really the best word for it
I really wouldn't think you would've gone there
Your 3:1 port is already a great expansion
You really didn't need the wood port
I was afraid of red plonking the 3 8
Why would he ever do that
When as you pointed  out, the middle
He already has his best port, the 2:1 brick
if I took the 6 11 5 and you took the 9 10 11
he would have been forced to the edge
I can assure you, I wouldn't take the spot that costs me an extra road to read the port when I make 0 brick
Someone has 2 knights played, and 6 3 11 expansion
What do you want in return
I can use a knight to unblock you later
its gonna go on the solo 8 oj
if u wanna go that route u dont win either
You should block red while you have the chance
I still owe him a nb
you should have blocked him then.. regardless of nbs owed
I told u what would happen and u soloed me lol
u seriously asking why?  u know homie
You mean " if u wanna go that route u dont win either"
So I honor a deal and I get screwed
Make me a villain no matter what I do
nobody told u to solo me hoie
In feeding black road, blue gets brick
It's the single best spot to block
Im last man.. u needed to block red
